gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/425)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/425)
text: تَذَاكَرُوا الشُّؤْمَ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ الشُّؤْمُ فِي ثَلَاثٍ فِي الْمَرْأَةِ وَ الدَّابَّةِ وَ الدَّارِ فَأَمَّا شُؤْمُ الْمَرْأَةِ فَكَثْرَةُ مَهْرِهَا وَ عُقْمُ رَحِمِهَا .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Usman Bin Isa, from Khalid Bin Najeeh,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘They mentioned the misfortune in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The misfortune is in three – in the woman, and the animal, and the house. So, as for the misfortune in the woman, so it is the largeness of her dower and bareness of her womb’.
en.sarwar: 51. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Khalid ibn Najih who has said the following: “People mentioned misfortune before abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and he (the Imam) said, ‘Misfortune is in three things: They are woman, a stumper and a house. Misfortune in woman is the large amount of her mahr (dower) and barren womb.’”
